ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rendering_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., antiAliasing) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "dynamic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is dynamic or static */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the setting */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed value for the setting (for numeric settings) */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value for the setting (for numeric settings) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is required */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., Display, Printing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rendering_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding rendering setting */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* The actual value for the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default value */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed value for the setting (for numeric values) */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value for the setting (for numeric values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_values_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "user_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rendering setting being customized */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected value for the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  "preset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preset being used (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES rendering_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rendering setting accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shares the setting */,
  "collab_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is granted access to the setting */,
  "collab_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting being shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collab_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("collab_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presets" (
  "preset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preset */,
  "preset_name" TEXT /* Name of the preset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the preset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preset was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preset_settings" (
  "preset_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preset setting link */,
  "preset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preset */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rendering setting */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected value for the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preset setting was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preset_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preset_settings_preset_id FOREIGN KEY ("preset_id") REFERENCES presets ("preset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preset_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rendering setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the rendering setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("setting_id")
)
